action.escalation_action: If there is no response, follow up with the official complaint/reference number and the same evidence packet. Start with: Use GBA/BBMP local corporation channels or Namma Bengaluru/Sahaaya for local civic issues.
action.legal_or_rti_action: For a persistent unresolved issue, ask the department for written status, responsible office, and related work/order records for Whitefield. Use RTI only for official records; do not include private account details outside official workflows.
action.message_draft: Hello, I want to report a road or footpath issue at Whitefield. Ward/corporation: 38 Whitefield / East. I can share photos, pin/landmark, date/time, and recurrence details. For public context: I found public work/payment rows that may help frame the issue; they are not proof of field resolution. Please route this to Greater Bengaluru Authority / local city corporation and share the official complaint/reference number.
action.primary_action: File through the relevant GBA/BBMP civic channel for Whitefield; include photo, pin, date/time, and recurrence details.
